findings.evidence: `rg` hit: `Complex.lean:43:def equivPerm : GridState n ≃ Equiv.Perm (Fin n)`; its only local use is `Complex.lean:50-51` in `Fintype.ofEquiv ... equivPerm.symm`.
findings.fix: Make the equivalence private, or define the `Fintype` instance directly/through a private helper; expose a state-permutation equivalence later only if a downstream API needs it.
findings.issue: `GridState.equivPerm` is exported even though this PR only needs it to build the `Fintype (GridState n)` instance for finite sums.

findings.evidence: `Complex.lean:133-136` marks `fullyBlockedDifferential_basis_apply` as `[simp]`, but `Complex.lean:160-162` states the arbitrary coefficient formula without an attribute.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to `fullyBlockedDifferential_apply_apply` unless it demonstrably causes bad rewriting; this lets users reduce differential coefficients without unfolding the linear-map body.
findings.issue: `fullyBlockedDifferential_apply_apply` is the elimination lemma for coefficients of the differential on an arbitrary chain, but it lacks the `[simp]` annotation while the basis coefficient lemmas are `[simp]`.

summary: The differential is mostly characterized by generator and coefficient lemmas, but the public surface includes an implementation equivalence and the main arbitrary-chain coefficient formula is not automated.
